Encodes canonical wire bridge envelope data.

## Import

```ts
import { encodeCanonicalWireBridgeEnvelope } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Signature

```ts
function encodeCanonicalWireBridgeEnvelope(envelope: CanonicalWireBridgeEnvelope): Uint8Array
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `envelope` | `CanonicalWireBridgeEnvelope` | Envelope to encode. |

## Returns

Canonical encoded bytes.

import { encodeCanonicalWireBridgeEnvelope } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
